60126687ebcf6238.title: Cooling a warming world: new EU project to help shape climate policy
60126687ebcf6238.summary:
This year’s heatwaves have made it hard to ignore what’s becoming the new normal in Europe and beyond: extreme heat that lasts longer, hits harder, and shows up more often. As temperatures keep rising, cooling is no longer just about comfort: it’s becoming essential for people’s health and everyday life in many regions.  The technologies […]

The post
60126687ebcf6238.title_draft: Why Cooling is Becoming the New Essential: Understanding Europe's Evolving Climate Regulations
60126687ebcf6238.why_relevant: 欧洲气候变化引发制冷需求激增，政策正在从单纯关注供暖转向供暖与制冷并重，对空调出口企业是重要机会。
60126687ebcf6238.summary_cn: 欧洲极端高温已成为常态，制冷需求正从舒适性需求转向健康与生活必需品。欧盟正在推动新的气候政策，以应对日益严峻的夏季高温挑战。文章讨论了政策制定背景及相关制冷技术的演变，强调了在欧洲市场应对极端气候带来的新机遇。

2c4fd3f5496024aa.title: Controllo intelligente degli impianti HVAC: come la building automation cambia la gestione energetica
2c4fd3f5496024aa.summary: Gli edifici di oggi non sono più quelli di dieci o trent’anni fa. Connessione, controllo remoto ed efficienza operativa sono diventati requisiti di base, non optional. Al centro di questa evoluzione c’è il BMS (Building Management System): la piattaforma che integra sensori, attuatori, controllori e sottosistemi — energia, illuminazione, sicurezza, antincendio — in un’unica in
2c4fd3f5496024aa.title_draft: Beyond Basic Cooling: How Smart BMS Integration is Revolutionizing Energy Efficiency in Modern Buildings

2c4fd3f5496024aa.summary_cn: 随着现代建筑对互联互通和能效要求的提高，传统的暖通管理已无法满足需求。本文探讨了楼宇管理系统（BMS）如何整合传感器、执行器及各类子系统，通过智能化手段实现能源、照明与安全的综合管控，是提升建筑运营效率的核心技术。
